chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الصَّدَقَةِ لِبَنِي هَاشِمٍ وَ مَوَالِيهِمْ وَ صِلَتِهِمْ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 89 – The charity to the Clan of Hashim and their slaves and their connected ones

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مختلف فيه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/191)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مختلف فيه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/191)
text: أَعْطُوا الزَّكَاةَ مَنْ أَرَادَهَا مِنْ بَنِي هَاشِمٍ فَإِنَّهَا تَحِلُّ لَهُمْ وَ إِنَّمَا تَحْرُمُ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ الْإِمَامِ الَّذِي مِنْ بَعْدِهِ وَ الْأَئِمَّةِ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِمْ أَجْمَعِينَ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, and Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, altogether from Al Hassan Bin Ali Al Washa, from Ahmad Bin A’iz, from Abu Khadeeja,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Give the Zakaat to the ones you need it from the Clan of Hashim<sup>as</sup>, for it is Permissible for them (from each other as per the above Hadith), and rather it is Prohibited upon the Prophet<sup>saww</sup>, and the Imam<sup>asws</sup> from after him<sup>saww</sup>, and the Imams<sup>asws</sup>, all of them’.
en.sarwar: 6. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu’alla’ ibn Muhammad and Muhammad ibn Yahya from Ahmad ibn Muhammad aff from Afi ibn al-Washsha’ from Ahmad ibn ‘ A”Iddah (waiting period) from abu Khadijah who has narrated the foiiowing: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘You can pay Zakat to banu Hashim who want it because it is lawful for them. It is unlawful only for the Holy prophet, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to your cause and for the Imam after him and to ’A’immah ‘Alayhim al-Salam.’”
